title: BEYOND HORIZONS MOD
description: A Minecraft mod that renders players beyond the normal player render distance, enabling true long-range visibility.
body:
### WHAT IS BEYOND HORIZONS?

Beyond Horizons is a mod that allows players to be seen far beyond the normal player render distance.
This mod must be installed on both the client and the server.

### How does it work?

Beyond Horizons creates and renders a lightweight “ghost” version of distant players.
This ghost smoothly scales with distance, allowing players to remain visible even at extreme ranges.



### MOD REQUIRES DISTANT HORIZONS

If your pc cant run distant horizons go into the DH Menu and disable rendering it will fix the issue with things disappearing 

### DISCLAIMER

Mods that modify or replace player animations—such as Epic Fight or Player Animator—may cause visual issues with Beyond Horizons player ghosts.

also yes you may use this in your modpack

and yes there will be more versions coming soon
